# What's Worth Building

An early, v1-shaped render (a plain Build section, no tiers), kept to prove the v2 parser stays
tolerant of the old shape: a bare Build splits by source into Build now vs Proposed.

## Build

### A one-glance team checkpoint
decided-by-human

- The team wants cheap early visibility more than a faster end-of-run report. [[Knowns & Unknowns|L4]]

### A single interrupt signal
proposed-by-AI

- One signal might be worth interrupting the team for, if one turns out to be enough. [[02 Research/Notes|notes]]

## Don't build

### A bigger end-of-run report

- Deferred: the team asked for early visibility, not a heavier final report.

## Implied but unruled

### Cross-project rollups

- The full vision implies rollups across projects, honestly undecided this early.
